critical_invariants: Jump table at 0x100010-0x1000A8 must remain IMMUTABLE - offsets are hardcoded by userland ABI
Boot sequence order: BSP init -> memory init -> driver init -> payload must be preserved
GDT and IDT base addresses must not change after setup
Stack pointer RSP must be valid at all times during boot
64-bit long mode transition sequence must remain intact
AP (Application Processor) startup sequence order is fixed by Intel MP spec
known_opportunities: Scheduler loop optimization: replace busy-wait with conditional PAUSE/MWAIT
HLT-to-MWAIT substitution for power-efficient idle on supported CPUs
NOP sled elimination in alignment padding between functions
Register allocation improvement in bsp initialization path
Branch prediction hints (likely/unlikely) on hot paths
Fuse CMP+JCC sequences into single macro-op where possible

immutable_regions.reason: Jump table - ABI contract with all userland programs and libraries
